FEBRUARY FACING THE PACIFIC

The month of love, lived by the sea

February is an invitation to choose differently. To give the gift of time, experiences, and moments that are not rushed.

Facing the Costa Rican Pacific, Hotel Terraza del Pacífico becomes a meeting point for rest, surf, music, and real connections. All just 1 hour and 30 minutes from San José.

STAYS THAT INVITE YOU TO STAY

February 2026 Rates

Accommodation with breakfast included from $188 per night for two people.
Ask about weekday rates or two-night stay offers.

Spacious settings, unhurried mornings, and the ocean as your daily backdrop.

Rates include taxes | Availability subject to confirmation
Check-in: 3:00 p.m. | Check-out: 1:00 p.m.
Beach in front of the hotel is not suitable for swimming.

Book your stay: +506 8431 9953

ENJOY YOUR DAY BY THE SEA

Day Pass | Use of Facilities

You don’t always need to stay overnight to live the experience.

Our Day Pass allows you to enjoy a full day by the sea, with full access to the oceanfront pool, gardens, common areas, showers, parking, and a relaxed atmosphere to disconnect.

Adults: $30

Children: $15

Rate per person | Taxes included

Reserve your Day Pass: +506 8431 9953

YOGA BY THE SEA

Why start 2026 practicing yoga by the ocean

Starting the year from a place of balance is one of the most valuable decisions we can make.

Practicing yoga facing the Pacific is an invitation to inhabit the body with greater presence, to breathe calmly, and to reconnect with a more natural rhythm. The sound of the sea accompanies each movement, while the light and the breeze create an environment that encourages deep rest and mental clarity.

Beyond movement, yoga offers benefits that extend into daily life: it helps reduce stress and cortisol levels, improves flexibility, strength, and posture, and promotes a state of mindfulness that translates into greater focus, better rest, and a sustained sense of well-being.

It is a space to pause, listen to the body, and begin 2026 with intention, self-care, and inner balance, in harmony with the nature that surrounds us.

Classes included and free for guests and clients:

Thursday – 10:00 a.m.

Saturday – 4:00 p.m.

Sunday – 11:00 a.m.

NIGHTS THAT FLOW WITH MUSIC

February nights move to the rhythm of the sea and local talent.

Monthly line-up:

Juanjo Sánchez: Sunday 1 · Saturday 7 · Saturday 21

Juanpa Gómez: Friday 6 · 13 · 20 · 27

Lorna Murillo: Sunday 8 · Sunday 22 · Saturday 28

Adriana Lobo: Saturday 14 · Sunday 15

Live music, great food, and sunsets that stretch beyond the clock.

TERRAZA HANG OUT

Training, practice, and surf community

Some afternoons are made for getting in the water.

Terraza Hang Out is an exclusive gathering for surfers, created as a space for free practice and preparation for the upcoming Terraza Surf Nights. A moment to train, repeat, refine technique, and share with the Playa Hermosa surf community.

It’s not a competition.
It’s training, repetition, and connection with the sea.

Thursday, February 12 and Thursday, February 26
In-water time: 6:30 p.m.
Recommended arrival: 6:00 p.m.
Beach in front of Hotel Terraza del Pacífico

Free registration: +506 8431 9953

TERRAZA SURF NIGHT

Night surfing returns

When night falls, the Pacific becomes the stage.

Next date: March 8
Beach in front of the hotel
Event open to the public

Free registration for participating surfers

A unique experience under the stars

Open invitation to brands and sponsors to be part of the event and gain brand exposure through broadcasts and coverage

Participants and brands: +506 8431 9953

LA VOZ | 2026 SEASON

Talent takes the stage again

Music continues to grow by the sea.

Official dates:

May 6 – Opening

May 13 – Second call

May 20 – Third elimination round

May 27 – Fourth elimination round

June 3 – Semifinal

June 14 (Sunday) – Grand Final

An event open to the public that celebrates new voices and memorable nights.

VALENTINE’S DAY

Moments created for two

Some gifts aren’t wrapped. They’re lived.

Romantic Getaway
Special decoration, wine or sparkling wine, breakfast in the room, and late check-out
From $105 i.v.i + accommodation

Romantic Dinner by the Sea
Three-course menu, decorated table, and welcome cocktail
$150 i.v.i per couple

Couples’ Spa Night
Relaxing massage (60 min), wine, chocolate-covered fruit, and special ambiance
$288 i.v.i per couple (does not include accommodation)

Romantic Picnic
Sparkling wine, fruit, blankets, and a custom-designed oceanfront setting
$200 i.v.i per couple

 Limited availability

Reserve in advance: +506 8431 9953

WHAT’S NEW AT TERRAZA

There’s always something new to discover.

Artisanal bakery inside the hotel, with fresh bread baked daily

New Grill Bar by Vivace | Beachfront, fire-grilled flavors by the ocean

 New kids’ playground and Art Party Kids every Saturday

SHARE YOUR EXPERIENCE

And receive a benefit

Follow us on social media, share a photo of your visit, tag us, and show it at checkout.
As a thank-you, you’ll receive a 10% discount on your consumption.
